notification.leave_rejected_subject: Your leave request has been rejected
notification.leave_rejected_body: Your leave request has been rejected.

dashboard.ai_desc: Real-time analysis of your attendance, goals, leave, and payroll data — detecting patterns, predicting trends, and suggesting improvements
dashboard.ai_good_sub: No improvement points detected by AI. Keep up the great work!
dashboard.ai_realtime: Real-time analysis — updated on page load
dashboard.action_good_sub: No improvements detected by AI. Keep it up!
dashboard.grade_top_message: 🏆 Highest Grade S+ Achieved! Keep it up.
dashboard.grade_hint_maintain: Stable attendance and completing goals are the fastest path.
dashboard.grade_hint_late: Prioritize reducing tardiness and updating goal progress.
dashboard.grade_hint_goal: Registering goals and reducing absences are most effective.
dashboard.grade_hint_start: Just registering one goal will greatly improve your score.
dashboard.self_commitment_ph: Example: I will be at my desk 10 minutes early every morning and aim for zero tardiness.
dashboard.self_appeal_ph: Example: Contributions not reflected in AI score (study sessions, mentoring juniors, etc.).
dashboard.alert_submit_required: Please enter category ratings or commitment.
dashboard.ai_ot_danger_desc: You've already worked {{ot}}h of overtime this month. At this pace, you're projected to reach about {{projected}}h by month-end. Please review task priorities.
dashboard.ai_ot_warn_desc: Currently at {{ot}}h. If this pace continues, you're projected to reach {{projected}}h by month-end. Adjust your workload early.
dashboard.ai_ot_zero_desc: No overtime as of day {{day}}. Work-life balance is maintained. Keep it up!
dashboard.ai_trend_down_desc: Average attendance dropped from {{prev}} → {{recent}} days over the last 3 months. Please check for any health or environment issues.
dashboard.ai_trend_up_desc: Average attendance increased from {{prev}} → {{recent}} days over the last 3 months. Consistent attendance continues.
dashboard.ai_late_danger_title: ⚠️ Attendance Issues Detected ({{late}} late, {{early}} early departures)
dashboard.ai_late_danger_desc: Late/early departure occurred in {{rate}}% of working days this month. Please review the pattern and consult your manager if needed.
dashboard.ai_late_warn_desc: {{late}} late arrival(s) recorded. This affects your attendance score in the semi-annual evaluation. Please reflect on the causes and work on improvements.
dashboard.ai_unposted_danger_desc: {{n}} weekdays of attendance are unrecorded this month. If you missed any punches, please correct them promptly. Unrecorded days may be counted as absences.
dashboard.ai_unposted_warn_desc: {{n}} weekday(s) without punch-ins. Please make sure to record your attendance.
dashboard.ai_goal_danger_desc: {{monthPct}}% of the month has passed but achievement is only {{pct}}%. At this rate, meeting monthly goals will be difficult. Review your priorities now.
dashboard.ai_goal_warn_desc: Goal achievement rate is {{gap}} percentage points below the pace. Consider reviewing or splitting your tasks.
dashboard.ai_goal_good_desc: You've achieved {{pct}}% of your goals. At this rate, you'll positively impact your semi-annual evaluation.
dashboard.ai_goal_none_title: 📝 No Goals Set for This Period
dashboard.ai_goal_none_desc: Setting personal goals can improve your semi-annual evaluation score by up to 30 points. Create goals now.
dashboard.ai_leave_pending_desc: {{n}} leave request(s) are pending. Check approval status and follow up if necessary.
dashboard.ai_leave_upcoming_desc: Multiple leaves are scheduled. Make sure to complete any handovers and preparations in advance.
dashboard.ai_payroll_desc: {{n}} payslip(s) remain unconfirmed. Please complete closing and approval checks.
dashboard.ai_grade_hint_title: 🤖 AI Analysis: Tips to Improve Semi-Annual Grade
dashboard.ai_grade_hint_desc: Based on current data, working on '{{points}}' has the potential to improve your grade by one level.
dashboard.ai_training_title: 📚 Use Skill-Up Content to Your Advantage
dashboard.ai_training_desc: Your goal achievement rate is {{pct}}%. Supplementing skills with educational content is expected to improve your achievement rate.

goals.title: Goal Management
goals.draft_note: After saving as draft, you can edit and request 1st approval.
goals.reject_reason_placeholder: Please enter the reason for return

tasks.title: Task Management
tasks.subtitle: Manage tasks from external tools in one place
tasks.desc_github: Manage GitHub Issues & PRs as tasks
tasks.saved_error: Failed to save. Please check your input.

schedule.subtitle: Manage meetings & schedules with in-app call integration

skillsheet.self_pr_placeholder: Describe your self-PR and strengths freely

semi.explanation: Analyzed {{gpsTotal}} GPS punches ({{manualCount}} manual), {{goalsTotal}} goals and {{reportCount}} daily reports in the last 3 months. Attendance: {{attendanceScore}}/28pts, Goals: {{goalScore}}/32pts{{goalNa}}, Work Quality: {{qualityScore}}/16pts, Overtime: {{overtimeScore}}/12pts, Leave: {{leaveScore}}/12pts{{leaveNa}}.{{cap}}
semi.no_data: No evaluation data available. Record attendance, goals and leave to begin your evaluation.
semi.error: An error occurred while retrieving data
semi.action_no_gps_detail: 0 GPS-authenticated punches recorded. Attendance scores are based on GPS punches only.
semi.action_no_gps_howto: Enable GPS on your smartphone and use the normal punch feature. Manual entries are not counted.
semi.action_no_gps_impact: GPS punches can earn up to 28 pts for attendance
semi.action_punctuality_title: Eliminate late arrivals and early departures (GPS-based)
semi.action_punctuality_howto: Prepare your workspace 15 minutes before the start of work.
semi.action_stability_detail: {{days}} absence(s) in GPS records. Each absence costs -3 pts.
semi.action_stability_howto: Use paid leave for illness and avoid unplanned absences.
semi.action_manual_title: {{n}} manual entry/entries — switching to GPS recommended
semi.action_manual_detail: {{n}} manual entry/entries are not counted in attendance evaluation.
semi.action_manual_howto: Manual additions are excluded from GPS evaluation. Switch to regular GPS punch to improve your score.
semi.action_manual_impact: Unifying to GPS punch improves evaluation accuracy
semi.action_no_goals_title: Register goals within the last 3 months (up to +32 pts)
semi.action_no_goals_detail: No goals registered within the last 3 months. Goal management accounts for 32% of the total score.
semi.action_no_goals_howto: Register your personal goals on the Goal Management page.
semi.action_no_goals_impact: Registering and achieving goals adds up to 32 pts
semi.action_progress_title: Bring goal progress to 75% or above
semi.action_progress_detail: Average progress in the last 3 months is {{avg}}%. Below 75% significantly lowers your score.
semi.action_progress_howto: Update progress at least once a week and consult your manager about stalled tasks.
semi.action_completion_howto: Update goals that are 100% complete to Completed status.
semi.action_overdue_detail: {{n}} incomplete goal(s) past their deadline (within 3 months).
semi.action_overdue_howto: Update the deadline or reduce scope by consulting your manager.
semi.action_no_gps3m_title: Increase GPS punches within the last 3 months
semi.action_no_gps3m_detail: 0 GPS punches in the last 3 months — punch accuracy cannot be evaluated.
semi.action_no_gps3m_howto: Enable GPS and use the normal punch feature.
semi.action_no_gps3m_impact: Normal GPS punches earn up to +8 pts (punch accuracy)
semi.action_punch_title: Bring GPS normal punch rate to 95% or above
semi.action_punch_detail: Last 3 months: {{normal}} normal out of {{total}} GPS punches ({{rate}}%).
semi.action_punch_howto: Reduce late arrivals and aim to punch at regular times.
semi.action_no_report_title: Submit daily reports every day (last 3 months)
semi.action_no_report_detail: 0 daily reports submitted in the last 3 months.
semi.action_no_report_howto: Develop the habit of submitting your daily report before the end of work.
semi.action_report_title: Bring daily report submission rate to 90% or above
semi.action_report_detail: Daily report rate in the last 3 months: approx. {{rate}}% ({{count}} reports).
semi.action_report_howto: Submit your daily report before the end of each workday.
semi.action_overtime_detail: {{n}} of the last 3 months exceeded 20h of overtime.
semi.action_overtime_howto: Review your to-do list 1 hour before end of work and deprioritize tasks that can wait.
semi.action_overtime_impact: All months under 20h earns +7 pts (overtime control)
semi.action_balance_title: Bring monthly work hours closer to 160 hours
semi.action_balance_detail: Average monthly work hours in the last 3 months: approx. {{workHours}}h (target 160h). Deviation: {{dev}}h.
semi.action_balance_howto: Avoid extremes and maintain stable work hours.
semi.action_leave_na_title: Leave management on hold — no paid leave remaining
semi.action_leave_na_detail: With 0 paid leave days, leave management is not evaluated.
semi.action_leave_na_howto: Once paid leave is granted, applying and taking leave will add to your score.
semi.action_leave_na_impact: Taking paid leave earns up to 12 pts (leave management)
semi.action_leave_plan_title: Build up leave applications to improve your score
semi.action_leave_plan_detail: {{days}} paid leave day(s) remaining. Pending: {{pending}}, Approved: {{approved}} (each +0.5 pts).
semi.action_leave_plan_howto: Plan and submit leave applications; each adds +0.5 pts (max 7 pts).
semi.action_leave_plan_impact: {{n}} more application(s) to reach full marks
semi.action_leave_approval_title: Get leave approved to improve your score
semi.action_leave_approval_detail: {{n}} approved paid leave(s) (each +0.5 pts, max 5 pts).
semi.action_leave_approval_howto: Apply early so leave can be approved and improve your score.
semi.action_leave_approval_impact: {{n}} more approval(s) to reach full marks
semi.action_data_title: Accumulate data to raise the score cap
semi.action_data_detail: Currently {{months}} month(s) of data (max score cap: {{cap}} pts). 6 months raises the cap to 96 pts.
semi.action_data_howto: Continued use accumulates data and enables a more accurate evaluation.
semi.action_data_impact: 6 months of data raises the score cap by +{{n}} pts
